import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import './Hero.css'; const Hero = () => { const [yearsCount, setYearsCount] = useState(0); useEffect(() => { const targetYears = 5; const duration = 2000; // 2 seconds const increment = targetYears / (duration / 50); const timer = setInterval(() => { setYearsCount(prev => { if (prev >= targetYears) { clearInterval(timer); return targetYears; } return Math.min(prev + increment, targetYears); }); }, 50); return () => clearInterval(timer); }, []); return (
{/* Animated Background */}
🌿
🍃
🌱
💊
🧪
⚗️
{/* Three Hero Sections */}
50% OFF
SHOP ONLINE STAY HEALTHY
{Math.floor(yearsCount)} Years of Excellence
50% OFF
"Before there were drugs, there was nature."

fresh exotic fruit

be fitness Healthy Food

); }; export default Hero;
